results.title: Basic shooting techniques
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Basketball Skills”.
Narrated by Ron Pickering, this is one in a series of films on basketball skills, giving instruction and demonstration of basketball techniques, including slow-motion action and training routines. No other credits available.

results.title: Basic training and conditioning: weight training. No. 2
results.creator_credit: Dr Frank Ryan and Ryan Films
results.brief_description: Shows the role played by muscles in various athletic events and illustrates the different exercises necessary for muscle development. A brief examination of the fibres of the muscles is given explaining how they function and how muscles are strengthened; preliminary conditioning for a young athlete training for shot putting, showing him incorporating and practising a weight training program; and the muscles emphasised in discus throwing, the high jump, and the javelin, and the weight training associated with each.

results.title: Basic training and conditioning: weight training. No. 1
results.creator_credit: Dr Frank Ryan and Ryan Films
results.brief_description: Expresses the opinion that much of the athletic achievement in recent years has been due to weight training and indicates the events associated with weight training or weight lifting. The part played by the various muscles in these events are pointed out, and the training program for developing these muscles illustrated and described.

results.title: Baroque dance 1675-1725 (TEFC)
results.brief_description: The dance which evolved to perfection within the French Academy though called ‘Baroque’, shares attributes with French classicism. Presents the dance within the visual context of the period showing the consistency in concept with other arts of the time. No other credits available.

results.title: Bantu tribes of Southern Africa
results.creator_credit: Willem Vilioen and Paul Hoefler Special Productions
results.brief_description: Describes the old ways of life among the Zulu, Xhosa, Swazi, Ndebele, Sotho and Venda tribes. These various Bantu groups are now being brought into the South African industrial community. Outlines the ways in which this movement is changing the culture of the tribes and the struggle to preserve some of the old ways.

results.title: Ballet by Degas
results.creator_credit: J.H. Lenauer, George Jacobson and Mavis Lyons
results.brief_description: Studies of a number of the ballet paintings by Edgar Degas (1834-1917): “The Ballet Class”, “Coryphee Resting”, “Ballerina and the Lady with the Fan”, all from the Philadelphia Museum of Art, and “On Stage”, “Dancers Practising at the Bar”, and “Pink and Green” from the collection of the Metropolitan Museum of Art.
